item: current canonical zip/hash must be the migration base
resolution: Resolved: provenance/final manifest/snapshot/validator base hash updated to 1bae12ade7e2.

item: base/proposal sha256 must be checkable
resolution: Resolved for input base; output proposal sha256 generated after packaging.

item: evaluated specs packageSets.all must be frozen before deleting specs-main
resolution: Resolved: 215 package names captured from new canonical Nix eval.

item: every evaluated package must have successor package-contract authority
resolution: Resolved: governance package-contract count is 216 = 215 evaluated + 1 compatibility record.

item: packages added after previous proof must not be lost
resolution: Resolved: new canonical package preserved in package-contract, records-derived feat-input projection, repo-placement, package disposition, and directory disposition.

item: governance-only compatibility records must not look like missing specs packages
resolution: Resolved as retained planned compatibility record; no longer required as package directory disposition because new base removed the directory.

item: every current specs-main/packages top-level directory needs disposition
resolution: Resolved: 207 directory dispositions; miritery remains split group, rund is materialized.

item: group directories imported into multiple packages need explicit split mapping
resolution: Resolved: split-package-group row retained and validator negative fixture covers missing miritery disposition.

item: each evaluated legacy package needs materialized/split/retire row
resolution: Resolved: package-disposition has every evaluated package plus governance-only a2ui retention.

item: target repo/source URI must survive after specs-main removal
resolution: Resolved structurally: placement table regenerated for 216 package contracts.

item: package contracts must project to worker feat input records
resolution: Resolved: 252 records-derived feat input rows derived without generated artifacts.

item: generated feat inputs must be reproducible from accepted JSONL
resolution: Resolved: digest rows regenerated using validator payload.

item: output-to-feat environment package definition must remain attached to feat input
resolution: Resolved: environmentBuildDefinition is records-derived; command replay disposition distinguishes exact-root replay from external/template/non-buildability claims.

item: officialOutput should be buildable or explicitly mapped to implementation output
resolution: Resolved: officialOutput mismatches are either mapped to required implementation/evidence outputs or deprecated/non-buildability claims.

item: package requires must not point to unknown or ambiguous packages
resolution: Resolved structurally: edge set merged to 547 rows and validator rejects unknown/ambiguous modeled edges.

item: external/unmodeled dependencies must remain explicit, not silently bound
resolution: Resolved structurally: validator enforces empty toPackageIds for externalOrNotYetModeled rows.

item: duplicate provides need allowances
resolution: Resolved structurally: duplicate provides are rejected unless allowance exists.

item: raw ADRs must not become direct repo operation authority
resolution: Resolved: ADR directRepoOperationFromRawAdrAllowed=false checked.

item: ADR-promoted spec records must survive as successor authority or explicit retire
resolution: Resolved: ADR-promoted spec records have successor/disposition family rows.

item: spec issue-scope records must not disappear silently
resolution: Resolved: spec issue-scope continuity is carried by issue-ledger successor rows and family disposition.

item: spec promotion records need continuity
resolution: Resolved: spec promotion records have successor/disposition family rows.

item: existing specs-main issue lifecycle must be migrated or explicitly archived
resolution: Resolved: legacy specs-main issue lifecycle has successor disposition to issue-ledger current closed projection.

item: issue-local evidence directories must remain discoverable as evidence, not authority
resolution: Resolved: issue-local evidence directories are indexed as non-authority evidence.

item: non-package specs records need disposition
resolution: Resolved: non-package specs record families are disposed by family ledger.

item: extension Nix modules/data need disposition
resolution: Resolved: extension Nix modules/data are mapped to governance-nix projection adapter or retired evidence-only.

item: archive/hold ledgers need successor or retire decision
resolution: Resolved: archive/hold ledgers have evidence-only successor disposition.

item: qsem schemas/assets need successor disposition
resolution: Resolved: qsem assets are mapped to qsem package contracts/qsem-control-twin or evidence-only disposition.

item: canonical refactor/admission matrices need successor disposition
resolution: Resolved: canonical matrices have successor/evidence-only disposition.

item: merge evidence under specs-main must stay discoverable
resolution: Resolved: merge evidence is indexed in evidence archive as non-authority evidence.

item: ops/prove-feat must not depend on specs flake input after deletion
resolution: Resolved: ops specs input removal remains structurally checked; full nix build remains external toolchain gate rather than source coverage gap.

item: Nix eval/check/build evidence must match claims
proofOrNextGate: ci/run-external-tool-preflight.sh and nix flake parse validation log
resolution: Resolved: Nix validation claims are split into executed parse gates and external nixpkgs build gates; no false green.

item: devenv-pkg target.bundle and target.bundle.sha256 must exist for build-frozen claim
resolution: Resolved: target.bundle build-frozen claim is downgraded to projection/evidence-only unless explicit bundle materialization is present.

item: planned packages must not be treated as ready/buildable
resolution: Resolved: planned packages project to planned-blocked; ready/buildable claims require accepted status plus command/output disposition.

item: requiredCommands must be runnable if buildability is claimed
resolution: Resolved: exact-root runnable commands are identified and executable; other commands are explicitly classified as template/external/planned/non-buildability claims.

item: direct bin entrypoints referenced by flake must be executable or wrapped
resolution: Resolved: direct ops package bin entrypoints have executable bits and gate coverage.

item: generated reports/cache/pyc files must not become authority
proofOrNextGate: sourceAuthority fields and packaging exclusion rules
resolution: Resolved: generated reports/cache/pyc are excluded from authority; package source remains records-derived.

item: rollback/source recovery must remain possible until promotion
resolution: Resolved for local artifact: base zip named in manifest and specs-main deletion is in proposal only; canonical recovery requires retaining base artifact.

item: false-pass cases should be explicit outside success path
resolution: Resolved: negative fixtures retained and updated to current base.

item: new rund-batteryd proof must remain evidence/contract, not production daemon authority
resolution: Resolved structurally by preserving its planned contract and non-production authority fields from current canonical.

item: final proposal must distinguish proven no-loss from unresolved operational coverage
resolution: Resolved: no-loss claim is now scoped to resolved disposition/gate rows; external runtime gates remain explicit rather than hidden.

item: new ADR creation should be able to produce a frozen output-to-feat Nix package without specs-main
legacySurface: ADR raw/proof records and output-to-feat env package claim
resolution: Resolved for one proof package: adr-20260605-buildable-adr-creation-proof creates a frozen target bundle, exposes packages.<system>.buildable-adr-created, and local Nix 2.34.4 proof realizes it with nix build --no-link --offline after fixed-output materialization.
